name: Semmelstulle
subtitle: Made in Germany
description: Official AltStore source for apps published by Atkins.sh.

apps.name: StarterSeeds
apps.subtitle: Your game launcher, always ready
apps.localizedDescription:
StarterSeeds is not affiliated with any of the products you see in the screenshots. They simply demonstrate the function of the app.

StarterSeeds just landed! Start and launch all your favourite iOS games from one place. Pin your favourites for easy access and scroll through your full library. You can also view your photo gallery in app if you want to do so with a controller. Just make sure you make it your "default launcher" by going to Settings > General > Game Controller > Controller Launcher.

versions.localizedDescription:
Version 1.2 - Smarter Filters, Smoother Control
Media Gallery
- Filter by media type (photos, videos)
- Filter by folders
- Gallery remembers your last selected item
- Set any photo as wallpaper directly from full-screen view
Navigation & Controls
- Key repetition: Hold D-pad or stick to continuously navigate
- Snappier, more responsive navigation throughout
- Improved bottom toolbar with clearer gamepad button hints
- Video player now only pauses system audio when actually playing videos
Interface
- Battery indicator now visible in landscape mode
- Refined full-screen viewing experience
Localization
- Added German translation
Performance
- Significant code restructuring for better performance
- Reduced battery consumption
- More reusable components for improved stability

news.title: StarterSeeds is now on AltStore PAL!
news.caption: Start and launch all your favourite iOS games from one place, now available in AltStore PAL.
